subtitle: Senior Technology Leader -- LLM/Agent Workflows | Data Foundations | Mission-Aligned Practice
summary_text: Senior technology leader with a data origin (DBA / SQL Architect) and 14 years owning the data function end-to-end at Money Management International -- a national 501(c)(3) nonprofit providing financial counseling, debt management, and consumer financial education. Production ML deployment, enterprise data warehouse maturation, and cross-functional data-definitions discipline across credit and servicing workflows. Currently consulting on AI architecture, automation, and implementation; running an LLM-assisted pipeline daily as working code. Mission pull toward progressive civic-data work; values diverse-team performance and evidence-based practice as performance levers, not posture. Comfortable across the data-quality / API-ingestion / LLM-workflow stack at architectural depth, with hands-on AI-assisted engineering practice.

bullets: Designed an algorithmic AI evaluation framework -- scoring rubric, capability taxonomy, evaluation flow -- adopted by a national CX consulting firm to compare enterprise contact-center AI platforms.
Hands-on AI-assisted engineering daily with Claude and GitHub Copilot; published thinking on AI adoption realities, the automation-vs-AI distinction, and practitioner workflow on LinkedIn.

Provide client-facing advisory on generative and agentic AI architectures, automation, and implementation; translate executive priorities into architectural trade-offs and concrete platform decisions.

Directed enterprise technology for a national 501(c)(3) nonprofit providing financial counseling, debt management, and consumer financial education -- auditable across all 50 states plus federal regulators including the CFPB, with HIPAA, PCI-DSS, and CARD Act overlays.

Owned the data function end-to-end for 14 years -- DBA / SQL Architect origin, enterprise data-warehouse maturation (reactive reporting -> proper DW -> self-service trajectory), and production ML deployment via DataRobot for credit and servicing use cases at scale.

Led cross-functional data-definitions discipline across 12+ executive and operations stakeholders -- agreement on metric calculations, definitions, and the cross-team incentive conflicts that surface around them.
Owned data governance and quality frameworks under continuous regulatory scrutiny; sustained 100% PCI-DSS certification across multiple audit cycles alongside HIPAA and 50-state compliance.

Directed BI / analytics rollout on Power BI, Tableau, and SQL-based data warehousing; transitioned the organization from reactive reporting to predictive ML in production for credit-decision and servicing workflows.
Spearheaded multi-year transition to a digital-first, cloud-first, security-first model; migrated all enterprise workloads to Azure across the data and platform stack.

Advanced through progressive roles: DBA / SQL Architect -> IT Manager -> VP IT -> first CTO in the organization's 45+ year history; built and led a 35+ direct (75+ extended) technology team; sustained highest retention and satisfaction in the enterprise.

Founded and ran a web development and IT consulting firm for 17 years -- full-stack delivery for dozens of clients; built and operated a proprietary commercial-grade CMS supporting dozens of production sites.
Independent execution end-to-end: discovery, scope, architecture, build, deployment, ongoing support -- across small teams and direct client engagement.

projects.title: github.com/mknnmknn/about-mknn
projects.desc: Overview of public projects, with access to private repositories on request. Featured project: career-ops-dml -- a private fork of santifer/career-ops, customized into the LLM-assisted pipeline used daily in my job search. Working code extended alongside Claude Code (Node.js, Claude API, Playwright, Go). Also of interest: i9s -- a what-if statistical projection of Negro Leagues players into MLB-era contexts; equal parts data modeling and historical research (PHP, JavaScript, WordPress + Pods, SQLite).

skills.items: Claude API, Generative AI, Agentic AI, LLM Platforms, AI-Assisted Engineering (Claude, GitHub Copilot)
DataRobot (Production ML), Data Warehousing, Data Governance, Power BI, Tableau
SQL / T-SQL, MSSQL, MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQLite -- DBA / SQL Architect origin
Python, JavaScript, Node.js, Git / GitHub, Playwright, Markdown / YAML
Microsoft Azure, Azure DevOps, GitHub, CI/CD
PCI-DSS, HIPAA, Multi-State Regulatory, GRC Programs
